question_intent: average points earned by constructors with at least 10 wins in races held in countries with at least 5 circuits

plan.question_intent: average points earned by constructors with at least 10 wins in races held in countries with at least 5 circuits
plan.detail_query: SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, ra.name AS race_name, ci.country AS race_country, cr.points AS constructor_points, cs.wins AS constructor_wins FROM constructors AS c JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid AND cr.raceid = cs.raceid WHERE ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 5) AND cs.wins >= 10

blocks.name: leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid AND cr.raceid = cs.raceid
where_clauses: ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 5)
blocks.notes: average points for constructors with at least 10 wins in races held in countries with at least 5 circuits

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: final scalar average of average points

steps.sql:

FROM constructors AS c
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid AND cr.raceid = cs.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid

SELECT *
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 5)
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 5))
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 3)
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 3))
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 3)) AND (cs.wins >= 10)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 3)) AND (cs.wins >= 5)
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.constructorid, AVG(cr.points) AS avg_points
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 3)) AND (cs.wins >= 5)
GROUP BY c.constructorid

build_logs.notes: final scalar average of average points

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.constructorid, AVG(cr.points) AS avg_points
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 3)) AND (cs.wins >= 5)
GROUP BY c.constructorid) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_points)
FROM (SELECT c.constructorid, AVG(cr.points) AS avg_points
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorresults AS cr ON c.constructorid = cr.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits AS ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ci.country IN (SELECT ci2.country FROM circuits AS ci2 GROUP BY ci2.country HAVING COUNT(ci2.circuitid) >= 3)) AND (cs.wins >= 5)
GROUP BY c.constructorid) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_points)
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins >= 0)
GROUP BY d.driverid, r.raceid) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average points scored per constructor, considering only constructors with at least 5 wins and races held in countries that have at least 3 circuits?
